title: WatchCreateRequest
description: Request to create a new watch on a key range

key.description: The key to watch in base64-encoded format

range_end.description: The range end for watching multiple keys in base64-encoded format

start_revision.description: Revision to start watching from. 0 means the current revision.

progress_notify.description: When true, sends periodic progress reports even when no events occur

filters.description: Event types to filter out from the watch stream

prev_kv.description: When true, includes the previous key-value pair in DELETE events

watch_id.description: User-assigned ID to identify this watch stream

fragment.description: When true, splits large watch responses into smaller fragments
